content.text:
ASSIGNMENT ANALYSIS

1. Assignment type: Analytical essay
2. Requirements: Five-page critical analysis of the provided text, with a clear thesis and supporting evidence drawn from the source material.
3. Key topics: Close reading, thematic analysis, textual evidence.
4. Length: Approximately 1500 words.
5. Formatting: MLA citation style, 12pt Times New Roman, double-spaced, 1-inch margins.
6. Rubric: Thesis clarity (25%), use of evidence (30%), organization (20%), mechanics (25%).
7. Other constraints: No outside sources permitted; analysis must be drawn entirely from the provided text.
